title: Bridge Essay: Self unbound: ego dissolution in psychedelic experience.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nonordinary — psychedelic decoupling, ego dissolution, DMN disruption, altered states.

**Self unbound: ego dissolution in psychedelic experience.**. Neurosci Conscious.. PMID: 30042848. DOI: 10.1093/nc/nix016. Users of psychedelic drugs often report that their sense of being aself or 'I' distinct from the rest of the world has diminished or altogether dissolved. Neuroscientific study of such 'ego dissolution' experiences offers awindow onto the nature of self-awareness.
